title: Marketplace Manager - More Retail Holdings Services - Growth Opportunity

jsonLd.title: Marketplace Manager - More Retail Holdings Services - Growth Opportunity
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at More Retail Holdings Services. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Marketplace Manager to strengthen our Lucknow-based team.

About More Retail Holdings Services:
More Retail Holdings Services is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking
• Develop and implement category growth strategies
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in WooCommerce
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing
• Proficiency in Content Writing
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Company-sponsored certifications
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Lucknow, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with More Retail Holdings Services!
